queries.question: For each graphic designer, list programs they use.
queries.sql: select graphic_designers.name , programs.programname from Graphic_Designers_Programs join Programs on Graphic_Designers_Programs.programId = Programs.id join Graphic_Designers on Graphic_Designers_Programs.graphicDesignerId = Graphic_Designers.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?programname WHERE {
  ?graphic_designers_programs a :Graphic_Designers_Programs .
  ?programs a :Programs .
  ?graphic_designers_programs p:hasPrograms ?programs .
  ?graphic_designers a :Graphic_Designers .
  ?graphic_designers_programs p:hasGraphic_Designers ?graphic_designers .
  ?graphic_designers p:name ?name .
  ?programs p:programName ?programname .
}

queries.question: What programs are common to all graphic designers?
queries.sql: SELECT Programs.programName  from Graphic_Designers_Programs join Programs on Graphic_Designers_Programs.programId = Programs.id join Graphic_Designers on Graphic_Designers_Programs.graphicDesignerId = Graphic_Designers.id   GROUP BY Graphic_Designers_Programs.programId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Graphic_Designers_Programs.graphicDesignerId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Graphic_Designers)

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me the programs every graphic designer uses.
